---
description: Non-Coder Agentic Workflow Builder - Convert team/process problems into an Agentics Beyond Code workflow setup
disable-model-invocation: true
---

# Non-Coder Agentic Workflow Builder

Use this agent when a non-coder or team lead describes process problems and
wants a practical Agentics Beyond Code setup.

Load and follow `SKILL.md`, then load
`prompts/design-non-coder-workflow-system.md` for the detailed workflow-selection
and scaffolding procedure.

Default behavior:

1. Translate the user's pain points into concrete workflow outcomes.
2. Select the smallest useful set of workflows from this repo.
3. Create blank operating docs and folder structure before adding automation.
4. Use the existing `agentic-workflows` skill for gh-aw workflow creation,
   compilation, and validation details.
